message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first StorageHandle::new at 4 bootstrap sites (tick 300)

Tick 300 milestone — migrates 4 more ambient `StorageHandle::new(&db_path)`
call sites in main.rs to the cx-first sibling `new_with_cx`:

- L10921 distributed remote-pane helper scratch storage
- L30890 `ft reservation create` command
- L30957 `ft reservation list` command (reuses storage_cx binding)
- L32017 `ft web` command storage open (shared web_cx)
+ L30894 `create_reservation` now uses `create_reservation_with_cx`

The cx-first sibling gates the DB open on the same two checkpoints as
`with_config_with_cx` (tick 299): pre-flight + between schema init +
writer-thread spawn.

## Tick 300 milestone: 114 ticks, 258 total cx-first migrations

Session started at tick 187. Over 114 ticks of methodical cx-first
migration across:

**main.rs cross-crate (200 sites):** storage reads/writes, wezterm ops,
caut subprocess, approval lifecycle, snapshot engine (capture +
shutdown), session restore, player replay, scenario simulate,
distributed agent (seed cursors, TLS handshake, message read, accept
loop, persist), IPC (client calls + server accept), metrics server,
diagnostic bundle, secret scan, workflow runner + engine, poll sleeps
(mux + watcher + shutdown bridge + orphan reaper + distributed +
record + audit follow + simulate pacing), timeouts (heartbeat +
handshake + accept), web server orchestrator, storage handle bootstrap.

**frankenterm-core internal (58 sites):** runtime.rs ingest/maintenance
(11), mcp.rs + mcp_helpers.rs + mcp_tools.rs (20), tui/query.rs (8),
web/handlers.rs + web/sse.rs (4), workflow runner/engine/
account_steps/wait_execution (4), tx_execution (3), simulation (1),
recording (2), wezterm trait ext + 2 poll helpers (3), orphan reaper
(1), watchdog + mux watchdog (2), restore_process seam holes (4),
restore_scrollback (1), snapshot_engine seam holes (3).

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
(5 warnings baseline).

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 114 (187-300).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 200 sites (196 before + 4).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 58 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
